title: dianthus tenuifolius var. subneglectus
intro: Dianthus tenuifolius var. subneglectus, a variety of the dianthus tenuifolius plant, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Dianthus tenuifolius var. subneglectus include its ability to act as an expectorant and a diuretic, helping to relieve respiratory issues and reduce water retention. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and inflammation, and its herbal preparations are used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and urinary tract infections. In herbal medicine, Dianthus tenuifolius var. subneglectus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
